message:
🐛 Reset cache failures when manually refreshing a cluster (#781)

When user clicks the refresh button on a cluster card, now also reset
the cache layer's failure counters for caches related to that cluster.
This removes the exponential backoff immediately so data refreshes at
normal intervals instead of waiting up to 10 minutes.

Changes:
- Add `resetFailures()` method to CacheStore class
- Add `resetFailuresForCluster(clusterName)` function that finds and
  resets failures for all caches containing the cluster name
- Call it from `refreshSingleCluster` alongside `clearClusterFailure`

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
